title: YKHC hosts Alaska Mental Health Trust visit to YK Delta
summary: Increasing access and resources for behavioral health in the region is a priority for YKHC. We were grateful for the opportunity to host Alaska Mental Health Trust Authority during their 2023 Rural Outreach Trip to the Yukon-Kuskokwim Region November 1-3. title: AVEC 2024 Board Nominations Are Open
summary: Alaska Village Electric Cooperative is accepting nominations to fill three seats on its seven-member board of directors. The terms of directors, Phyllis Clough of Old Harbor, Helena Jones of Ambler, and Peter Demoski of Nulato, end in April 2024. They are eligible for re-election. Nominees for the b...

title: Missing Address List

title: 2024-2025 Copper Basin Community Subsistence Permit Hunt
summary: The deadline to apply online for 2024-2025 CSH for CM300-moose is December 15, 2023 at 5:00 p.m. The Copper Basin CSH Caribou hunt CC001 will not be held in Regulatory Year 2024-2025. Visit https://www.adfg.alaska.gov/index.cfm?adfg=huntlicense.tier to apply now!

title: Norway, the Kingdom of Denmark and Sweden Should Prioritize Societal Security to Help Saving the Arctic Council
summary: Societal security should be given more attention in the Arctic Council which Norway, Denmark and Sweden chair for the next six years.
